name: @ahp/conformance-discovery
description: AHP conformance-suite discovery pipeline (Phases D0-D11). Each angle emits machine-readable inventory rows to out/<phase>.jsonl; D0 defines + gates the row schema; D11 merges by behavior-id into the surface matrix.

scripts.gate:all: node scripts/validate-inventory.mjs out/*.jsonl && node scripts/verify-citations.mjs out/*.jsonl
